claims: AC2.1: buildClaudeCmd("tui", model, {effort}) emits the expected Claude launch flags, starts with DISABLE_OMC=1, and omits --effort when empty.
AC2.2: buildCodexCmd("tui", model, {reasoning}) emits the expected Codex launch flags and omits model_reasoning_effort when reasoning is undefined.
AC2.3: parseModelFlag(value, role) maps claude values like opus:max to {engine:"claude", model:"opus", effort:"max"} and rejects empty models.
AC2.4: parseModelFlag(value) maps codex values like spark:medium to {engine:"codex", model:"gpt-5.3-codex-spark", reasoning:"medium"} and preserves empty reasoning boundaries.
AC2.5: parseModelFlag(value) rejects malformed multi-colon formats with an invalid format error.
